init.description: Settings for the security options configured for your device

stop_shade.name: Stop shade
stop_shade.description: Stops the shade at the current position

set_shade_position.name: Set position
set_shade_position.description: Sets the opening position to percentage

position.name: Position
position.description: The target position of the shade

set_tilt_position.name: Set tilt position
set_tilt_position.description: Sets the tilt position of the slats to percentage

tilt_position.name: Tilt position
tilt_position.description: The target tilt position of the slats

set_current_position.name: Force current position
set_current_position.description: Sets the current position in HA without moving the motor

position.name: Position
position.description: The position value to be saved

set_current_tilt_position.name: Force current tilt position
set_current_tilt_position.description: Sets the current tilt position in HA without moving the motor

tilt_position.name: Tilt position
tilt_position.description: The tilt position value to be saved

set_sunny.name: Set sunny state
set_sunny.description: Sends the command to the motor indicating whether it is sunny or not

set_windy.name: Set windy state
set_windy.description: Sends the command to the motor indicating whether it is windy or not

send_command.name: Send RTS command
send_command.description: Sends any raw command from the RTS protocol

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.description: Number of times the command will be repeated

send_step_command.name: Send step command
send_step_command.description: Sends a movement command in steps

direction.name: Direction
direction.description: The direction of the step (Up / Down)

step_size.name: Step size
step_size.description: The size of the step (maximum is 127)

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.description: Number of times the command will be repeated

reboot.name: Reboot device
reboot.description: Triggers a reboot of the ESPSomfy device

backup.name: Backup device
backup.description: Triggers a backup of the ESPSomfy device configuration
